description: Benchmark prompts for orchestration intent classification and routing accuracy. Each entry includes the prompt, expected detected phases, expected complexity tier, and notes. Used by P1-014 regression suite.

prompts.prompt: Write a threat model for our new payment API
prompts.notes: Clear security signal; no other phase signals present.

prompts.prompt: Create a test strategy and write unit tests for the auth service
prompts.notes: QA-only prompt; no architecture or implementation signals.

prompts.prompt: Review this pull request for code quality and maintainability
prompts.notes: Explicit PR review request; standalone skill.

prompts.prompt: Write a product requirements document for a user notification feature
prompts.notes: PRD and feature spec are primary requirements signals.

prompts.prompt: Create a release plan and changelog for version 3.0
prompts.notes: Release and version are primary release signals.

prompts.prompt: We have a production outage. Help me triage and create a postmortem
prompts.notes: Incident triage is standalone; loads immediately regardless of prior phases.

prompts.prompt: Write an executive summary of our Q2 delivery status for the board
prompts.notes: Leadership reporting with no implementation signals.

prompts.prompt: Set up Prometheus metrics and Grafana dashboards for our API
prompts.notes: Observability tools are primary signals.

prompts.prompt: Design the database schema and API endpoints for a todo application
prompts.notes: Database schema and API endpoint are primary backend signals.

prompts.prompt: Build a React component library with accessibility and design system support
prompts.notes: React, component, accessibility, and design system are frontend signals.

prompts.prompt: Design and implement a payment microservice with a REST API and PostgreSQL database
prompts.notes: Design maps to architecture; implement + REST API + database map to backend.

prompts.prompt: Build a secure user authentication service with JWT and write integration tests
prompts.notes: Three-phase prompt: backend implementation + security (JWT, auth) + QA (tests).

prompts.prompt: Perform a security review of this service and create a deployment plan
prompts.notes: Security review + deployment plan; two distinct phase signals.

prompts.prompt: Design an LLM-based document extraction pipeline and define the evaluation strategy
prompts.notes: LLM and evaluation are primary AI engineering signals; architecture added by dependency expansion.

prompts.prompt: Conduct a code review and then run a security audit on the reviewed service
prompts.notes: Sequential review then security; two explicit phase signals.

prompts.prompt: Write user stories and acceptance criteria for the checkout feature, then design the system architecture
prompts.notes: User stories + acceptance criteria → requirements; then architecture explicitly requested.

prompts.prompt: Set up CI/CD pipelines, define SLOs, and configure alerting for our production service
prompts.notes: CI/CD maps to release; SLO and alerting map to observability.

prompts.prompt: Build a production-grade AI-enabled document processing API with architecture, backend, security review, tests, CI/CD deployment, and observability
prompts.notes: Sprint quality gate benchmark scenario from BACKLOG.md Section 18. Seven explicit phase signals.

prompts.prompt: Design, build, secure, test, and release a new feature end-to-end with compliance reporting
prompts.notes: Six phases explicitly requested; end-to-end scope.

prompts.prompt: We need to build an AI agent platform: define requirements, design the architecture, implement the backend, conduct security review, write tests, deploy it, and set up monitoring
prompts.notes: Eight explicitly named phases; full SDLC with AI.

prompts.prompt: Our RAG pipeline needs a governance review and audit evidence for our SOC 2 audit
prompts.notes: RAG maps to AI engineering; SOC 2 audit maps to compliance-governance.

prompts.prompt: Implement the React frontend for our checkout flow and ensure WCAG 2.1 accessibility compliance
prompts.notes: React + frontend + accessibility are primary frontend signals. Architecture added by dep expansion.

prompts.prompt: Write a test strategy covering unit, integration, and end-to-end tests, then build a CI/CD release pipeline
prompts.notes: Test strategy → QA; CI/CD release pipeline → release-management.

prompts.prompt: Help me with my software project
prompts.notes: No specific signals. Should fall back to requirements as safe default or classify as unknown and ask a clarifying question.

prompts.prompt: Improve our system
prompts.notes: Vague directive. No phase signals. Safe fallback expected.

prompts.prompt: We need to do something about performance and reliability
prompts.notes: Reliability is a weak observability/SRE signal. Classification should be medium confidence at most.

prompts.prompt: Refactor the authentication module, review the code, and add missing test coverage
prompts.notes: Refactor + review → code-review; add test coverage → qa-automation.

prompts.prompt: Define the OpenAPI spec for our GraphQL gateway and design the database schema
prompts.notes: API spec and database schema are backend signals; GraphQL gateway design is an architecture signal.

prompts.prompt: Classify this project's AI risk tier and map it to our compliance controls
prompts.notes: Risk classification and compliance controls are primary compliance-governance signals.

prompts.prompt: We are building a HIPAA-compliant AI medical records API. We need architecture, backend, LLM integration, threat modeling, comprehensive tests, a deployment plan, and audit evidence.
prompts.notes: Regulated domain (HIPAA) + AI + full lifecycle. Seven phase signals. Should also trigger escalation consideration due to regulated data.
